title: States crack down on tax break for wealthy investors
summary: States including New York and Oregon are targeting the Qualified Small Business Stock (QSBS) tax break that was expanded by the One Big Beautiful Bill Act, aiming to reduce tax incentives for wealthy investors.
content: The One Big Beautiful Bill Act turbocharged the tax break on QSBS, but states including New York and Oregon have taken aim at the incentive.

zh.title: 美国各州打击富有投资者税收优惠
zh.summary: 包括纽约和俄勒冈州在内的美国各州正在针对由《一个大美好法案》扩展的合格小企业股票(QSBS)税收优惠，目标是减少对富有投资者的税收激励。

title: Gilt yields ease as UK PM Starmer says 'tough' election results won't make him quit
summary: UK Prime Minister Starmer remains committed despite tough local and devolved government election results, helping stabilize government bond yields amid political uncertainty.
content: The U.K. is counting votes after an election of local councilors and devolved governments on Thursday.

zh.title: 英国首相斯塔默表示"艰难"选举结果不会让他辞职，债券收益率缓解
zh.summary: 英国首相斯塔默尽管在地方和权力下放政府选举中面临艰难结果，仍保持坚定承诺，这有助于在政治不确定性中稳定政府债券收益率。

title: Marco Rubio says U.S. expects Iran response on peace deal 'today'
summary: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio announced the U.S. is awaiting Iran's response on Washington's proposal to end the ongoing war, signaling diplomatic activity on a critical geopolitical issue.
content: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio said Friday that the U.S. is expecting a response from Iran on Washington's proposal to end the war.

zh.title: 马克·鲁比奥表示美国期待伊朗对和平协议的回应
zh.summary: 美国国务卿马克·鲁比奥宣布美国正在等待伊朗对华盛顿提出的结束进行中战争的提议的回应，显示在关键地缘政治问题上的外交活动。

title: I was a slave to credit-card debt, then I got laid off and turned my life around. Here’s how I did it.
summary: A personal finance story about overcoming credit card debt following job loss through aggressive spending cuts, demonstrating how lifestyle changes can rebuild financial stability.
content: The biggest promotion is often the one we can give ourselves by cutting back on our spending.

zh.title: 我曾被信用卡债务束缚，后来失业了我扭转了人生。我是怎么做到的。
zh.summary: 一个个人财务故事，讲述了一个人在失业后通过激进的支出削减来克服信用卡债务，展示了生活方式改变如何能够重建财务稳定性。

title: Most women are confident savers, survey finds — but where they stash their cash could be a problem
summary: A survey finds women are confident savers, but about half keep non-retirement savings in low-yield accounts or cash, which fail to keep pace with inflation and leave money underutilized.
content: About half of women have most of their non-retirement savings either in low-yielding accounts or physical cash, neither of which keep up with inflation.

zh.title: 调查发现，大多数女性是自信的储蓄者——但她们存放现金的地方可能是个问题
zh.summary: 一项调查发现，女性是自信的储蓄者，但约一半的人将非退休储蓄存放在低收益账户或现金中，这些无法跟上通货膨胀，导致资金被低估。

title: Just graduated? Here’s your financial cheat sheet for building real wealth.
summary: Financial experts advise recent graduates to establish intentional saving and spending habits early in their careers, as these foundational practices significantly impact long-term wealth building.
content: Financial experts say building intentional saving and spending habits early can go a long way toward long-term financial success.

zh.title: 刚毕业？这是你建立真实财富的财务速查表。
zh.summary: 财务专家建议应届毕业生在职业生涯早期建立有目的的储蓄和支出习惯，因为这些基础实践对长期财富建设有重大影响。

title: A cloud computing stock is soaring more than 22%. Here’s what’s driving the rally
summary: Cybersecurity and cloud firm Akamai surged 22% after reporting Q1 earnings with 40% year-over-year growth in cloud infrastructure, demonstrating strong demand in the sector.
content: Cybersecurity and cloud computing firm Akamai reported first-quarter earnings on Thursday and saw its cloud infrastructure business grow 40% year-on-year.

zh.title: 一只云计算股票飙升超过22%。以下是推动这波涨势的原因
zh.summary: 网络安全和云计算公司Akamai在报告Q1财报后大涨22%，云基础设施的同比增长率达到40%，显示该行业需求强劲。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Cloudflare, Akamai Technologies, JFrog, Trade Desk & more
summary: Tech stocks including Cloudflare, Akamai Technologies, JFrog, and Trade Desk are posting significant premarket price movements ahead of market open.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前涨跌幅最大的股票：Cloudflare、Akamai Technologies、JFrog、Trade Desk等
zh.summary: 包括Cloudflare、Akamai Technologies、JFrog和Trade Desk在内的科技股在市场开盘前出现大幅波动。

title: Shake Shack stock hasn't been this cheap in years. Stifel says it's time to buy
summary: Investment firm Stifel upgraded fast-casual chain Shake Shack from hold to buy, citing attractive valuations after the stock reached multi-year lows.
content: The investment firm upgraded the fast casual chain to buy from hold.

zh.title: Shake Shack股票多年来从未如此便宜。Stifel表示是时候买入了
zh.summary: 投资公司Stifel将快餐连锁店Shake Shack的评级从持有升至买入，理由是该股达到多年低点后估值具有吸引力。

title: South East Water boss quits after supply failures
summary: South East Water CEO David Hinton resigned following widespread service outages that affected tens of thousands of customers in Kent and Sussex, highlighting operational and management failures.
content: David Hinton faced criticism after outages affected tens of thousands of people in Kent and Sussex.

zh.title: 南东水务公司首席执行官在供水失败后辞职
zh.summary: 南东水务公司首席执行官大卫·辛顿在大范围服务中断后辞职，该中断影响了肯特郡和苏塞克斯郡数万名客户，突显了运营和管理失败。

title: The Tech Download: Meta, Google enter AI agent race as ‘agentic wars’ heat up
summary: Meta and Google are rushing to develop AI agent tools following the viral success of personal assistant OpenClaw, intensifying competition in the emerging agentic AI market.
content: The viral personal assistant OpenClaw has triggered a rush among Big Tech to build agentic tools.

zh.title: 科技快讯：Meta和谷歌进入人工智能代理竞赛，"代理战争"升温
zh.summary: 在个人助手OpenClaw的病毒式成功之后，Meta和谷歌正在争相开发人工智能代理工具，加剧了新兴的代理AI市场的竞争。

title: This new target for the S&P 500 is very nearly Wall Street’s highest. Here are the trades to make.
summary: RBC Capital Markets has set an S&P 500 price target near Wall Street's record highs, supported by solid earnings reports and a favorable economic backdrop.
content: Earnings and a supportive economic backdrop should help stocks, says RBC

zh.title: 标普500指数的新目标接近华尔街最高水平。以下是交易方案。
zh.summary: RBC资本市场为标普500指数设定了接近华尔街纪录高位的价格目标，受到稳健的收益报告和有利经济背景的支持。

title: US jet fuel could be used in Europe to ease possible shortages
summary: An international aviation body suggests broader acceptance of U.S.-grade jet fuel in Europe could help prevent potential supply shortages amid ongoing energy concerns.
content: An international air body suggests wider acceptance of US-grade jet fuel could help to head off any supply problems.

zh.title: 美国喷气燃料可用于欧洲以缓解可能的短缺
zh.summary: 一个国际航空机构建议，欧洲更广泛地接受美国级喷气燃料可能有助于防止在能源持续关注背景下的潜在供应短缺。

title: Stocks at all-time highs can still go higher. Here’s one case for buying into the rally.
summary: If Middle East tensions ease, investors could refocus on fundamental market drivers like earnings and AI innovation, potentially supporting stock gains from record highs.
content: If hostilities dissipate in the Persian Gulf then investors should be able to refocus their attention on the real drivers of the market: earnings and the AI boom

zh.title: 股票处于历史高位仍可能继续上升。这是看好这波涨势的一个理由。
zh.summary: 如果中东紧张局势缓和，投资者可能会重新关注基本面市场驱动因素，如收益和人工智能创新，这可能支持股票从历史高位获得更多涨幅。

title: Spending in the U.S. just slumped, and Bank of America isn’t sure why
summary: Bank of America identified an unexpected decline in U.S. consumer spending based on customer credit and debit card data, raising questions about economic momentum and household consumption trends.
content: Something funny just happened in the U.S. economy, according to Bank of America after the nation’s number-two bank looked at credit- and debit-card use by its customers.

zh.title: 美国支出刚刚暴跌，美国银行不确定原因
zh.summary: 美国银行根据客户信用卡和借记卡数据发现了美国消费者支出的意外下降，引发了对经济动力和家庭消费趋势的疑问。

title: Toyota fourth-quarter profit misses by wide margin as U.S. tariffs drive 49% slump
summary: Toyota's fourth-quarter profits declined significantly by 49%, primarily due to U.S. tariffs impacting its operations. Despite a modest 1.89% year-over-year revenue increase, the automaker's earnings fell short of expectations, highlighting tariff pressures on the global automotive industry.
content: The world's largest automaker by sales volume saw a 1.89% year-on-year rise in revenue during the fourth quarter ended March.

zh.title: 丰田第四季度利润大幅下滑，美国关税导致利润下降49%
zh.summary: 丰田第四季度利润因美国关税影响而显著下降49%。尽管年同比收入增长1.89%，这家汽车制造商的盈利仍未达到预期，凸显了关税对全球汽车工业的压力。

title: ‘Not a Chance Hormuz Opens’: How Wall Street’s new NACHO trade bets on a prolonged oil shock
summary: Wall Street traders are executing the "NACHO" trade, wagering that disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz and elevated oil prices will remain elevated for an extended period. This trading strategy reflects expectations that geopolitical tensions will sustain higher energy costs.
content: Traders are embracing the “NACHO” trade, betting Hormuz disruptions and elevated oil prices will persist longer than expected.

zh.title: "荷尔木兹海峡不可能开放"：华尔街新的NACHO交易如何押注长期油价冲击
zh.summary: 华尔街交易员正在执行"NACHO"交易策略，押注霍尔木兹海峡中断和高油价将在较长时期内保持上升。这种交易策略反映了地缘政治紧张局势将维持较高能源成本的预期。

title: From oil giants to banks - these companies are making billions from Iran war
summary: Oil companies and financial institutions are reporting significant profit increases and share price gains amid the Iran conflict. The geopolitical crisis has created a profitable environment for certain sectors, particularly energy and banking.
content: Through surging profits or soaring share prices, the war has been a boon for some firms.

zh.title: 从石油巨头到银行——这些公司正在从伊朗战争中获利数十亿
zh.summary: 石油公司和金融机构在伊朗冲突中报告了利润大幅增加和股价上涨。这一地缘政治危机为特定行业，特别是能源和银行部门创造了有利可图的环境。

title: World Cup fans in China and India face broadcast uncertainty
summary: As the World Cup approaches, broadcasters in China and India have not yet secured broadcast rights from FIFA, leaving fans uncertain about how they'll watch the tournament. The timing is critical with the competition starting in just weeks.
content: Broadcasters in the two countries have yet to reach deals with Fifa, just weeks before the tournament is due to start.

zh.title: 中国和印度世界杯球迷面临转播权不确定性
zh.summary: 随着世界杯临近，中国和印度的广播公司尚未从国际足联获得转播权，球迷对如何观看比赛感到不确定。比赛将在数周内开始，时间至关重要。

title: Oil resumes rally as U.S.-Iran fire exchange rattles fragile Hormuz ceasefire
summary: Oil prices surged following a military exchange between the U.S. and Iran in the Strait of Hormuz, intensifying concerns that the ceasefire between the two nations is deteriorating. The incident highlights the fragility of the current regional stability.
content: The U.S. and Iran exchanged fire in the Strait of Hormuz, raising fresh fears that the fragile ceasefire between the two countries was unraveling.

zh.title: 美伊军事交火冲击脆弱的霍尔木兹海峡停火，油价恢复涨势
zh.summary: 美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡发生军事交火后，油价随之上涨，加剧了人们对两国停火协议恶化的担忧。这一事件凸显了当前地区稳定的脆弱性。

title: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today - what does this mean for your DMs?
summary: Meta announced it is disabling end-to-end encryption for Instagram direct messages, marking a significant reversal of its privacy protections. The move raises concerns about user privacy and Meta's commitment to secure communications on the platform.
content: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.

zh.title: Instagram隐私技术今日关闭——您的私信意味着什么？
zh.summary: Meta宣布将禁用Instagram直接消息的端到端加密，标志着对其隐私保护的重大逆转。此举引发了人们对用户隐私和Meta对平台安全通信承诺的担忧。

title: Why pension funds are doubling down on private credit despite deepening cracks
summary: Pension funds continue to increase their exposure to private credit despite growing concerns about weakening underwriting standards, opaque valuations, and concentrated risk. The persistence of this investment strategy amid warning signs suggests either confidence in long-term returns or pressure to meet yield targets.
content: Pension funds are sticking with private credit, and in some cases doubling down even as concerns mount over underwriting standards, valuation opacity and sector concentration.

zh.title: 为什么养老基金在出现深层裂缝的情况下仍在加倍押注私募信贷
zh.summary: 尽管对承保标准下降、估值不透明和风险集中的担忧日益增加，养老基金仍在继续增加对私募信贷的敞口。尽管有警告信号，这一投资策略的持续存在表明要么对长期回报充满信心，要么受到满足收益目标的压力。

title: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
summary: The Iran conflict may dominate the Trump-Xi summit agenda, potentially pushing critical business issues like rare earth minerals and supply chain discussions to the background. This geopolitical focus could delay progress on key economic concerns for U.S. companies.
content: Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit.

zh.title: 特朗普-习近平峰会上的伊朗焦点可能会延缓关税、稀土元素方面的进展
zh.summary: 伊朗冲突可能会主导特朗普-习近平峰会议程，可能将稀土矿物和供应链讨论等关键商业议题推到后台。这一地缘政治焦点可能会延缓美国公司关键经济问题的进展。

title: Oil futures rise after U.S., Iran trade fire; stock futures quiet after court rejects Trump’s tariffs
summary: Oil futures climbed Thursday following military exchanges between the U.S. and Iran in the Persian Gulf, while stock futures remained relatively flat after a federal court invalidated Trump's backup tariff plan. The developments highlight geopolitical tensions affecting energy markets and policy uncertainty impacting equities.
content: Oil futures moved higher late Thursday while stock-index futures were little changed after the U.S. and Iran exchanged fire in the Persian Gulf,  and after a federal court struck down President Donald Trump’s backup tariff plan.

zh.title: 美国伊朗冲突后油期货上升；法院驳回特朗普关税计划后股指期货平稳
zh.summary: 周四油期货在美国与伊朗在波斯湾的军事交换后上升，而在联邦法院无效特朗普备用关税计划后股指期货保持相对平稳。这些事件突显影响能源市场的地缘政治紧张局势和影响股市的政策不确定性。

title: Cloudflare to cut 20% of staff in a big bet on AI. Investors aren’t sold.
summary: Cloudflare announced a 20% workforce reduction that executives frame as an AI-focused investment rather than cost-cutting, but investors reacted negatively with stock declines. The disconnect between management's strategic vision and market skepticism underscores concerns about the company's transformation approach.
content: The company’s stock falls as co-founders say the layoffs are “not a cost-cutting exercise.”

zh.title: Cloudflare削减20%员工进行AI大赌注。投资者不看好。
zh.summary: Cloudflare宣布员工减少20%，高管将其框架为专注于AI的投资而非成本削减，但投资者反应消极，股价下跌。管理层战略愿景与市场怀疑之间的脱节强调了人们对公司转型方法的担忧。

title: Iren’s stock soars as a major Nvidia investment overshadows revenue shortfall
summary: Iren's stock surged after Nvidia announced a major investment stake to build out a 5-gigawatt global AI data center footprint. The strong market reaction prioritizes Nvidia's long-term infrastructure ambitions over Iren's current revenue shortfall.
content: Nvidia is taking a major stake in Iren to build out a 5-gigawatt global footprint for its AI factory ambitions

zh.title: 英伟达重大投资使Iren股价飙升，收入不足被掩盖
zh.summary: Nvidia宣布进行重大投资以建立5吉瓦全球AI数据中心，随后Iren股价飙升。强劲的市场反应优先考虑英伟达的长期基础设施雄心，而非Iren目前的收入不足。

title: SoundHound’s stock falls as acquisitions weigh on earnings results
summary: SoundHound's stock declined as recent acquisitions pressured quarterly earnings, though the company noted revenue would have grown more without them. Despite analysts viewing the acquisitions as strategically valuable, investors focused on near-term earnings headwinds.
content: The company said revenue would’ve grown more not counting its recent acquisitions, but analysts say they put SoundHound in a strong position.

zh.title: SoundHound股票下跌，因收购压低财报业绩
zh.summary: SoundHound股票下跌，因最近的收购压低了季度业绩，尽管公司表示若没有这些收购，收入增长会更快。尽管分析师认为这些收购战略上具有价值，但投资者关注的是短期业绩逆风。

title: Airbnb is seeing some of its fastest growth from this surprising segment
summary: Airbnb is experiencing rapid growth from hotel bookings following its recent market expansion, offsetting some demand disruptions caused by Iran-U.S. tensions. The platform's diversification strategy is showing early signs of success in a traditionally core business segment.
content: The travel app has seen some demand disruptions from the Iran war, but is showing early success with its recent pivot into offering hotel bookings

zh.title: Airbnb在这个令人惊讶的领域看到了一些最快的增长
zh.summary: Airbnb在最近市场扩张后，通过酒店预订实现快速增长，抵消了伊朗-美国紧张关系造成的部分需求下降。该平台的多元化战略在传统核心业务领域显示出早期成功迹象。

title: AI is coming for your job after all. These new announcements prove it.
summary: Major technology companies including Cloudflare, Upwork, and Bill announced significant workforce reductions this week, building on Coinbase's earlier layoffs. The coordinated wave of cuts signals that AI-driven business optimization is moving from industry promise to concrete employment impact.
content: The tech sector is leading a rush of mass layoffs. Cloudflare, Upwork, Bill outlined big cuts on Thursday, following Coinbase’s announcement earlier in the week.

zh.title: AI最终还是会来抢你的工作。这些新公告证明了这一点。
zh.summary: 包括Cloudflare、Upwork和Bill在内的主要科技公司本周宣布大幅裁员，延续Coinbase之前的裁员行动。这一协调一致的裁员浪潮表明，AI驱动的商业优化正在从行业承诺转变为具体的就业影响。

title: Oil prices rise after US and Iran exchange fire in Hormuz strait
summary: Oil prices increased following military exchanges between the U.S. and Iran in the Hormuz Strait, escalating risks to the fragile ceasefire Trump extended indefinitely on April 21. The clash threatens critical energy supply routes and could sustain commodity price pressures.
content: The flare-up further endangers the US-Iran ceasefire, which Trump extended indefinitely on 21 April.

zh.title: 美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡交火后油价上升
zh.summary: 美伊在霍尔木兹海峡的军事冲突导致油价上升，加剧了特朗普在4月21日无限期延长的脆弱停火的风险。这场冲突威胁关键能源供应路线，可能导致商品价格压力持续。

title: 5 reasons stocks are rallying in the face of an oil-price shock
summary: U.S. stocks finished the week higher despite Thursday losses, with the S&P 500 approaching 7,400 for the first time in history amid oil-price volatility. The rally suggests investors are looking past near-term commodity shocks to longer-term economic fundamentals.
content: U.S. stocks were lower Thursday but still higher for the week, with the S&P 500 on the verge of breaking above 7,400 for the first time ever.

zh.title: 股市在油价冲击面前上涨的5个原因
zh.summary: 尽管周四下跌，美国股市本周收高，标普500指数在油价波动中首次接近7400点。这轮上涨表明投资者超越短期商品冲击，转向关注长期经济基本面。

title: Asia-Pacific markets open lower on fresh Iran-U.S. tensions following clashes
summary: Asia-Pacific markets declined Friday as geopolitical concerns intensified following renewed Iran-U.S. military clashes that threaten the already fragile ceasefire. The regional equity sell-off reflects investor anxiety over potential escalation and disrupted energy supplies.
content: Asia-Pacific markets open lower Friday, as concerns grew over renewed hostilities between Iran and the U.S. amid a fragile ceasefire.

zh.title: 亚太市场因美伊冲突后的新紧张局势低开
zh.summary: 随着美伊军事冲突重新升级威胁脆弱停火，地缘政治担忧加剧，亚太市场周五下跌。地区股票抛售反映了投资者对潜在升级和能源供应中断的担忧。
